name: Credit Repair Xperts in Jacksonville
description_short: The Credit Xperts is a credit repair company in Jacksonville offering dispute services to remove negative items like collections, late payments, and public records from credit reports.
description_long:
The Credit Xperts operates as a credit repair service focused on the Jacksonville, Florida market. Founded with a mission to help clients achieve financial success through credit restoration, the company positions itself as a reputable alternative to other credit repair providers. The company has been operating for multiple years and maintains an online presence at thecreditxperts.com with a Jacksonville-specific landing page.

The company specializes in disputing inaccurate negative items on credit reports under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA). Their stated services include removing collections, late payments, charge-offs, judgments, bankruptcies, student loan issues, and public records from credit reports across the three major bureaus (Equifax, TransUnion, Experian). They offer customized credit repair programs rather than one-size-fits-all solutions, with entry-level pricing starting at $149 per month. Free consultations are available by phone at (941) 326-2890.

The company emphasizes ethical and legal dispute practices, explicitly stating they "specialize solely in ethical, legal credit repair." They position themselves around the FCRA requirement that inaccurate or unverifiable information must be corrected or removed. The website highlights potential customer benefits including improved credit scores, qualification for mortgages and auto loans, reduced interest rates, and elimination of cosigner requirements.

Key limitations exist: pricing pages and detailed service information return 404 errors, making it difficult to verify specific program structures or pricing tiers beyond the $149/month baseline. The website contains limited testimonial detail (no names or specific outcomes shown) and no verifiable third-party reviews are referenced. No information is provided about company credentials, licensing, or dispute success rates. The phone number listed (941) 326-2890 is a Sarasota area code rather than Jacksonville, raising potential questions about actual service location.
pros: Explicitly commits to FCRA-compliant, ethical dispute practices rather than aggressive tactics
Customized program design tailored to individual credit profiles rather than standardized templates
Entry-level affordability at $149/month for customers with limited budgets
Free consultation available to assess credit situation before enrollment
Targets removal of specific negative item types: collections, late payments, charge-offs, bankruptcies, judgments
Serves three major credit bureaus (Equifax, TransUnion, Experian) rather than one
Transparent mission statement emphasizing client success over revenue maximization
cons: Pricing pages inaccessible (404 errors) — no ability to verify full program costs or compare tiers
No verifiable success rates, dispute win percentages, or average credit score improvements disclosed
Phone number uses Sarasota area code (941) not Jacksonville area code — potential geographic inconsistency
About Us and detailed service pages return 404 errors — limited company background verification available
No third-party reviews, Better Business Bureau ratings, or independent verification mentioned on website
best_for: Jacksonville-area consumers with collections, late payments, or charge-offs seeking affordable entry-level repair
Individuals denied mortgage or auto loans who want to dispute inaccurate negative items before reapplying
Credit profiles with mixed negative items requiring customized rather than standardized dispute strategy
diagnosis: The Credit Xperts is best suited for Jacksonville consumers with legitimate credit report errors—collections, late payments, charge-offs—who want FCRA-compliant dispute services at affordable monthly rates ($149+). Primary caveat: lack of accessible pricing tiers, verifiable success data, and geographic inconsistencies (Sarasota phone number) make it difficult to assess actual capabilities or guarantee service quality before committing; prospective clients must call for detailed program information.
services: Credit score monitoring across three bureaus
